title: Warrior Rage
description: Minecraft Mod, which brings rage during fights
body:
[![kinetichosting](https://i.imgur.com/2HlGnLM.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=102)
## Warrior Rage

...is a simple mod which brings functionality of **Kill Streak** to Minecraft. Killing mobs in short time will grant you more attack damage or even fire aspect on the hit. I've created this mod to help with fights in dungeons, where a lot of mobs spawn. Mod is still in early stage of development.

![warriorragebanner](https://i.imgur.com/mVCWXQg.png)

[![Discord badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/f8Nnj5VuFj)
[![Ko-Fi badge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular-alt_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tiviacz1337)  

### Features

*   Rage turns on after getting 3 (Configurable) mob kills in a period of 20 (Configurable) seconds.
*   Rage bar appears, which represents how much time player has left to gain next mob kill and keep the kill streak. If player doesn't kill any mob within time, the rage is lost.
*   A kill counter appears on the right side of the hotbar. Default max kill count is 20 (Configurable) and if player reaches the limit, damaging enemies will burn them for 2 seconds.
*   Default damage bonus of 0.5 (Configurable) is added every 4 (Configurable) kills in a streak. **It means that streak of 20 kills will grant player additional 2.5 damage points per hit during rage**.
*   If rage is enabled, flame particles will spawn around player every few seconds. The overlay can be disabled in config.

Feel free to post your suggestions about new features in mod!

![warriorragegif](https://i.imgur.com/tX1BGKb.png)
